# Change Request

## Purpose
Document proposed changes to scope, schedule, cost, or quality and route them for approval.

## Audience
Change Manager, Project Manager, Sponsor, PMO Lead.

## Inputs
- Current baseline plans and scope.
- Impact analysis (`docs/templates/shared/change-impact-assessment.md`).

## Required Sections
- Change summary
- Reason for change
- Impact summary
- Alternatives considered
- Decision and approvals

## 1. Change Summary
- **Change ID:**
- **Requested by:**
- **Date requested:**
- **Change type:** (scope, schedule, cost, quality, risk)

## 2. Reason for Change
Describe the business driver, regulatory requirement, or risk mitigation.

## 3. Impact Summary
| Area | Impact | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Scope |  |  |
| Schedule |  |  |
| Cost |  |  |
| Quality |  |  |
| Risk |  |  |

## 4. Alternatives Considered
| Option | Description | Pros | Cons |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |

## 5. Decision & Approvals
| Approver | Role | Decision | Date |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |

## Completion Checklist
- [ ] Impact assessment attached.
- [ ] Alternatives evaluated.
- [ ] Decision recorded.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Change request includes rationale, impacts, and alternatives.
- Approval authority documented.
